questionHtml: Identify the bonds causing peaks A and B in the IR spectrum of the unknown compound using section 26 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
A: C–H «in alkanes, alkenes, arenes»

AND

B: C=O «in aldehydes, ketones, carboxylic acids and esters»

[1 mark]

meta.title: Identify the bonds causing peaks A and B in the IR spectrum of the unknown compound using section 26 of the data booklet.
